description: Performs preprocessing of .fcs or .txt flow cytometric data files
author: GenePattern Team
plan:
## FLAMEPreprocess GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
FLAMEPreprocess is a GenePattern module that Performs preprocessing of .fcs or .txt flow cytometric data files

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: dataset, file.type, data.scale, remove.dead, channels, channel.names, scatter.channels, transformation, logicle.cofactor, arsinh.cofactor, output.prefix
- Optional: none

### 3. Command Line
```
<R-2.7.2> <libdir>preprocess.gp.R parseCmdLine <libdir> <dataset> <remove.dead> <channels> <channel.names> <scatter.channels> <file.type> <transformation> <data.scale> <logicle.cofactor> <arsinh.cofactor> <output.prefix>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: A .zip file containing flow files in .txt or .fcs format. (The files should be all .txt or all .fcs, but not both.)

parameters.name: file.type
parameters.description: File type of input sample data.

parameters.name: remove.dead
parameters.description: Whether to attempt removing dead cells from the samples.

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of channel numbers indicating which columns (antibodies) to keep (e.g., 1, 2, 3, 7).

parameters.name: channel.names
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of channel/antibody names that corresponds to the channel numbers (e.g., FSC, SSC, CD4, CD45RA).

parameters.name: scatter.channels
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of scatter channel numbers (e.g., 1, 2, 3).

parameters.name: logicle.cofactor
parameters.description: A cofactor that tunes the logicle transformation. The cofactor is usually greater than 0 and less than 10.

parameters.name: arsinh.cofactor
parameters.description: A cofactor that tunes the arsinh transformation. The cofactor is 0 usually between 0 exclusively and a few thousand.
